meaning: n.四旬斋(旧时由主教规定给教士、俗人或由修道院院长规定给修道士的斋戒,共40天,在此期间只许吃面包,喝水)
examples: The maximum 3-carene contents in oleoresin and turpentine are 27.50% and 44.99% respectively from one tree.
This paper reported that the product distribution of photosensitized oxygenation of carene by aromatic cyanide are related to solvent and sensitizers.
